## ⚠️ Important — Read Before Submitting

**PreeclampsiaRisk · WVSUMC** is a closed, proprietary research prototype.

**Feature requests are not accepted via GitHub Issues.**

This repository only accepts bug reports. If you open this issue as a genuine
feature request, it will be closed without review.

---

## If You Are a Clinician or Researcher

Clinical feedback on scoring methodology, parameter thresholds, or model validity
is taken seriously — but it belongs in a direct conversation, not a public Issue.

Please contact the owner directly:

**Email:** [gdddevelopers.dev@gmail.com](mailto:gdddevelopers.dev@gmail.com)  
**Subject:** `[CLINICAL FEEDBACK] PreeclampsiaRisk — <topic>`

---

## If You Encountered a Technical Bug

Please close this issue and open a **Bug Report** instead using the correct template.
